IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Consolidated Tribal Health Project, Inc. is committed to healthy lifestyles and honoring traditional native American values to maintain physical, mental, emotional, spiritual, and social well-being of the community.
IRS990.MissionDesc: Consolidated Tribal Health Project, Inc. is committed to healthy lifestyles and honoring traditional native American values to maintain physical, mental, emotional, spiritual, and social well-being of the community.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: Operate Local Health & Dental CLinic; Provide Training & Screening For Diabetes; Nutrition; HIV & Community Wellness. Compassionate Care to Natives while waiting for verification of tribal enrolment and/or insurance.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The Organization is a nonprofit corporation under Internal Revenue Code Section 501(c)(3) and has been granted tax-exempt status by the Internal Revenue Service and the California Revenue and Taxation Code. As of December 31, 2024, the Organization had no unrecognized tax positions or uncertain tax positions requiring accrual. Therefore, no provision for income taxes has been provided in the financial statements.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Part XI, Line 2d: Other revenue amounts included in F/S but not included on form 990
Part XII, Line 2d: Other expenses and losses per audited F/S
Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FORM 990 IS PRESENTED FOR REVIEW AT THE BOARD MEETING, EMAILED OUT TO ALL BOARD MEMBERS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THROUGH ENFORCEMENT OF POLICIES AND PROCEDURES, HR OFFICE AND COMPLIANCE OFFICER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SALARY IS REVIEWED BASED ON THE MARKET DATA.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SALARY IS REVIEWED BASED ON THE MARKET DATA.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON WRITTEN REQUEST.
